objective:
Objectif de stratégie: "Utiliser les signaux RSI<30 et Aroon sur un timeframe d'1 heure pour anticiper les transitions entre tendance et rétraction sur le marché Bitcoin/Dollar (BTC-USD). Intègre des filtres anti-faux-signaux, une gestion de risque non linéaire basée sur la volatilité implicite/réelle pour maximiser les gains tout en minimisant les pertes, et analyse le comportement aleatoire à l'aide d'hypothèses testables et falsifiables."
Entrées : RSI<30 et Aroon sur 1h timeframe. Conditions: filtre anti-faux-signaux basé sur la confirmation inverse partielle, gestion de risque non linéaire (SL/TP adaptatifs à la volatilité), comportements aleatoires imposés par mode_counter_consensus et mode_inverse pour confirmer les signaux.
Sorties : positions ouvertes en fonction des entrées, avec stop-loss (SL) et take profit (TP) ajustables pour maximiser les gains tout en minimisant les pertes.

iterations.hypothesis: Using RSI below 30 and Aroon on a 1-hour timeframe to anticipate trend reversals in the Bitcoin/USD market, incorporating anti-fake signal filters, non-linear risk management based on implied/real volatility, and random behavior imposed by mode_counter_consensus and mode_inverse.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy seems well thought out and is based on robust technical indicators. However, it does not incorporate fundamental analysis which could be useful in identifying potential turning points in the market. It also assumes a linear relationship between volatility and risk management which might not always hold true in real markets. A backup plan would be to introduce some form of fundamental analysis to assess long-term trends and shifts in market sentiment.
[Backup plan] If results are poor (negative return), we could consider introducing a mean reversion strategy that takes into account the underlying macroeconomic conditions or switching to another asset class altogether such as equities which might have better performance. If Sharpe ratio is low, we can look at increasing our position size and potentially adding leverage if risk management allows.

iterations.hypothesis: The Aroon indicator can predict the trend direction on Bitcoin/Dollar (BTC-USD) market.
